title: Citrusy Fish Bites
description: A kid-friendly American dish featuring a citrusy fish sauce marinade that's gooey and perfect for snacks or as an appetizer.
instructions: Combine lemon juice, orange juice, fish sauce, minced garlic, soy sauce, sesame seeds, paprika, and optional ginger paste in a bowl.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Gently mix the marinade into the cod fillets, ensuring they are evenly coated.
Marinate for at least 30 minutes or up to several hours in the refrigerator.
Place marinated fish on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 10-12 minutes until golden brown and cooked through. If serving warm, let it rest for a couple of minutes before serving.
Serve immediately as an appetizer or snack.
